profile.name: Qinan Zhang
profile.affiliation: University of Science and Technology of China

en.headline: M.Eng. Student at USTC working on robotics, embodied AI, vision-language navigation, and world models.
en.intro: I focus on connecting multimodal perception, spatial reasoning, and decision-making with real or high-fidelity simulated robotic systems, especially for navigation, embodied evaluation, and deployable robot intelligence.
en.availabilityBody: Available for research internships and collaborative research opportunities.
en.caption: Current work centers on embodied navigation, benchmark construction, simulation pipelines, and executable robot intelligence for realistic environments.

zh.badge: 具身智能 · 机器人 · 多模态 AI
zh.headline: 中国科学技术大学硕士生，研究方向涵盖机器人、具身智能、视觉语言导航与世界模型。
zh.intro: 我关注如何将多模态感知、空间推理与决策能力落到真实或高保真仿真机器人系统中，尤其聚焦导航、具身评测与可部署的机器人智能。
zh.availabilityBody: 正在寻找高质量研究型实习与科研合作机会。
zh.caption: 当前工作集中于具身导航、评测基准构建、仿真数据流水线，以及面向真实环境的可执行机器人智能。

en: I am currently an M.Eng. student in Electronic and Information Engineering at the University of Science and Technology of China. My research focuses on robotics, embodied AI, world models, vision-language navigation, and related multimodal AI problems.

I am particularly interested in connecting multimodal perception, spatial reasoning, and decision-making with real or high-fidelity simulated robotic systems, especially for navigation, embodied evaluation, and deployable robot intelligence.
I am actively working on research projects in robotics and embodied AI, and I am seeking research internship opportunities in these areas.
zh: 我目前就读于中国科学技术大学电子与信息工程专业硕士，研究方向主要包括机器人、具身智能、世界模型、视觉语言导航以及相关多模态 AI 问题。
我尤其关注如何将多模态感知、空间推理和决策能力与真实或高保真仿真机器人系统结合起来，面向导航、具身评测和可部署的机器人智能开展研究。
目前我正持续推进机器人与具身智能方向的科研项目，并积极寻找相关研究型实习机会。

quickFacts.en: Embodied AI, VLN, World Models, Multimodal AI
quickFacts.zh: 具身智能、视觉语言导航、世界模型、多模态 AI

quickFacts.en: Navigation, benchmark design, deployable robot systems
quickFacts.zh: 导航、评测基准设计、可部署机器人系统

quickFacts.zh: 科研实习与长期学术发展

educationHighlights.en: Awards: Outstanding Graduate, First-Class Scholarship, and repeated academic honors.
educationHighlights.zh: 荣誉：优秀毕业生、一等学业奖学金，以及多项学术奖励。

internship.companyZh: 科大讯飞股份有限公司
internship.roleZh: 算法工程师，核心研发平台
en: Worked on real-time beautification of handwritten Chinese characters, including algorithm optimization, literature review, and prototype verification.
Built Python-based analysis tools over 200+ user sessions and developed a Qt demo, improving user satisfaction by 23% in internal A/B testing.
zh: 围绕汉字手写实时美化任务开展算法优化、文献调研与原型验证工作。
基于 Python 分析 200+ 用户书写数据，并开发 Qt 演示系统，在内部 A/B 测试中满意度提升 23%。

skills.itemsEn: PyTorch, model training and evaluation, VLA, VLN, ablation study, reproducibility
skills.itemsZh: PyTorch、模型训练与评测、VLA、VLN、消融分析、结果复现

skills.itemsEn: Isaac Sim, Isaac Lab, Unreal Engine, PyBullet, Gazebo

skills.titleZh: 三维场景与数据流水线
skills.itemsEn: 3DGS pipeline, LiDAR and UAV data collection, scene reconstruction, simulation-ready assets
skills.itemsZh: 3DGS 流水线、LiDAR 与 UAV 数据采集、场景重建、仿真资产构建

contactIntro.en: If you are interested in robotics, embodied AI, benchmark construction, or simulation-to-real research, feel free to reach out by email or GitHub.
contactIntro.zh: 如果你对机器人、具身智能、评测基准构建或仿真到真实部署研究感兴趣，欢迎通过邮件或 GitHub 与我联系。
